name: demo-coding-team
summary: Demo coding team package with one coding/orchestration host, a dedicated planning specialist, architecture and implementation specialists, wave-aware planning with sequential checkpoints, proactive functional verification, branch/PR finishing support, mandatory phase verification, and evidence-first exploration support.
team_workflow: Host can consult architect and specialists during planning and build work.
Host must synthesize findings before delegating follow-up work and persist plan/analysis artifacts before verifier handoff.
Every completed phase must go through the phase verifier before success can be claimed.
Comprehensive code reviewer can be called at the beginning or end of a work cycle.
Git discipline is anchored in the host via worktree hygiene for isolated flows and agenthub-prepare-pr hygiene for normal feature branches.
Plans can be organized into sequential verification waves, and the host can use agenthub-proactive-verify at wave checkpoints when active functional validation is needed.
vendoring_note: Lightweight skill subset. Four heavyweight skills are excluded from the built-in package; see promotion-memo.md for details.
